// About Me

WHO
I AM

ANURAG KUMAR
Full Stack Developer

I'm a results-driven Full Stack Developer from Lucknow, UP, specializing in AI-integrated web applications using the MERN stack. Currently completing my B.Tech in Computer Science at Dr. Shakuntala Misra National Rehabilitation University.

I build scalable, intelligent systems — combining RESTful API architecture, JWT authentication, and LLM integrations (OpenAI, HuggingFace) to deliver user-centric products. Recently completed a Software Development Internship at Kodnest Technologies, Bengaluru.
